index.title: Welcome to My Blog!
index.content:
I am Dong Xing, a sophomore at Princeton International School of Mathematics and Science.
I am interested in Computer Science, especially competitive programming. I was a USA Computing Olympiad Finalist in 2026.
This is my blog. Hope you have a great time!
